markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a content partnership for Priority Gold.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Shift from paid ads to organic growth (SEO, AI search visibility) for Priority Gold, a gold investment firm targeting a 55+ audience.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Priority Gold wants to influence AI search by targeting Reddit, believing it feeds \~40% of AI results. GrowthX counters that on-site content is more effective for their audience.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX uses a human-in-the-loop AI workflow, built by a former CMO, to scale high-quality content. This process drove a 24x traffic increase for DeepGram and enabled Augment Code to cut paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Tyler will email Michal a proposal with pricing and case studies to share with marketing director Alex Lean and owner Jonathan Krammerman before a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

## Topics

### Priority Gold's Challenge & Goals

  - [**Business:** Gold investment firm (Dallas) targeting a 55+ audience for IRA rollovers.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [**Minimums:** $10k cash deal, $25k IRA deal.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Current Strategy:** Heavy paid ad spend (millions/mo) on Google, Bing, Taboola, and comparison sites for lead gen.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**New Goal:** Build a sustainable organic channel to reduce paid ad dependency.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Primary Objective:** Gain visibility in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Google Gemini), where the firm is currently absent.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Proposed Solution: GrowthX's AI Content Engine

  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel, a former CMO who built DeepGram's organic engine, driving 24x traffic in 18 months with zero paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Process:** A human-in-the-loop AI workflow for scalable, high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Context):** Deep analysis to create artifacts for ICPs, brand voice, and product details.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Scale):** Daily content production (publish/refresh) using AI workflows and human oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Grew organic traffic from $20k to $70k/mo in 6 months, enabling them to shut off paid ads.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Uses programmatic content to establish authority on business spending, appearing in "Airtable vs. Monday" searches.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**ROI Tracking:** A custom analytics dashboard will track traffic and AI visibility from GrowthX-created content.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

### Strategic Debate: Reddit vs. On-Site Content

  - [**Priority Gold's Rationale for Reddit:**](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [Believes Reddit feeds \~40% of AI search results, based on a thread Michal read.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
      - [Previous Reddit agency failed due to low post engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Counter-Argument:**](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [On-site content is more effective for a 55+ audience.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI search prioritizes recency; refreshing existing content is a quick win.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide data to prove on-site content is a better investment for Priority Gold.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Email Michal a proposal with pricing, process details, and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [**Michal:** Share the proposal with marketing director Alex Lean and owner Jonathan Krammerman.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [**Michal:** Schedule a follow-up call with Alex Lean and Jonathan Krammerman to review the proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/XFyniu1asGUiiJxQ1_rrWDgLBJ_i2KkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
